description: Moderate icing FL080-FL180 along northeast corridor; IMC conditions at KBOS, KEWR. Expect delays 30-60 min.
recommended_action: File alternate, carry extra fuel, consider 2h delay

description: Light turbulence FL120-FL200 west of BVU departures. Smooth above FL200.
recommended_action: Plan cruise above FL200 or accept light chop

description: KPSM: BKN003 OVC006 BR, visibility 1/2SM. IFR conditions. Expect Cat I ILS approaches.
recommended_action: Delay departures by 90 min or file IFR with Cat I alternate

description: KATL GDP in effect due to holiday volume. Avg ground delay 45 min for arrivals.
recommended_action: Request EDCT, advise owner of potential delay
